title: Spell Enchants for All! - Prominence II
description: Adds spell enchants to most weapons.
body:
#### Adds spell enchantments to most weapons of the game.
### Spell Power:
- Simply Swords Uniques that cast spells
- Simply Swords Uniques that scale with spell power
- Marium's Soulslike Weapons that cast spells and have added spell power
- All Prominent Artifacts
### Spell Haste:
- Simply Swords Uniques that cast spells
- Marium's Soulslike Weapons that cast spells and have added spell power
- All Prominent Artifacts
### Spell Infinity:
- All weapons tagged as "#c:swords"
